# Install Data Flow

The `ecc install` pipeline from CLI entry through content copying and hook merging.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    CLI["ecc binary<br/>(Rust CLI)"] --> INSTALL["ecc install"]
    CLI --> INIT["ecc init"]

    INSTALL --> DETECT["Detect language<br/>from project files"]
    INSTALL --> VALIDATE["Validate language<br/>rules/ exists"]

    DETECT --> COPY_PHASE["Copy Phase"]
    VALIDATE --> COPY_PHASE

    COPY_PHASE --> AGENTS["Copy agents/<br/>→ ~/.claude/agents/"]
    COPY_PHASE --> COMMANDS["Copy commands/<br/>→ ~/.claude/commands/"]
    COPY_PHASE --> SKILLS["Copy skills/<br/>→ ~/.claude/skills/"]
    COPY_PHASE --> RULES["Copy rules/<br/>→ ~/.claude/rules/"]
    COPY_PHASE --> HOOKS["Merge hooks.json<br/>→ ~/.claude/settings.json"]

    AGENTS --> FS["~/.claude/<br/>(file system output)"]
    COMMANDS --> FS
    SKILLS --> FS
    RULES --> FS
    HOOKS --> FS

    INIT --> TEMPLATE["Select template<br/>(auto-detect or --template)"]
    TEMPLATE --> CLAUDE_MD["Create/merge CLAUDE.md"]
    TEMPLATE --> PROJ_HOOKS["Merge hooks<br/>→ .claude/settings.json"]
```
